briefdescription.para: creates bitset of given size filled with given value Generated from constructor MR.TypedBitSet<MR.Id<MR.ICPElemtTag>>::TypedBitSet. Parameter fillValue defaults to false.
copies all bits from another BitSet (or a descending class, e.g. TypedBitSet) Generated from constructor MR.TypedBitSet<MR.Id<MR.ICPElemtTag>>::TypedBitSet.
moves all bits from another BitSet (or a descending class, e.g. TypedBitSet) Generated from constructor MR.TypedBitSet<MR.Id<MR.ICPElemtTag>>::TypedBitSet.
Generated from method MR.TypedBitSet<MR.Id<MR.ICPElemtTag>>::test_set. Parameter val defaults to true.
subtracts b from this, considering that bits in b are shifted right on bShiftInBlocks*bits_per_block Generated from method MR.TypedBitSet<MR.Id<MR.ICPElemtTag>>::subtract.
Generated from method MR.TypedBitSet<MR.Id<MR.ICPElemtTag>>::autoResizeSet. Parameter val defaults to true.
Generated from method MR.TypedBitSet<MR.Id<MR.ICPElemtTag>>::autoResizeSet. Parameter val defaults to true.
Generated from method MR.TypedBitSet<MR.Id<MR.ICPElemtTag>>::autoResizeTestSet. Parameter val defaults to true.
Generated from method MR.TypedBitSet<MR.Id<MR.ICPElemtTag>>::resize. Parameter fillValue defaults to false.
Generated from method MR.TypedBitSet<MR.Id<MR.ICPElemtTag>>::uncheckedTestSet. Parameter val defaults to true.
changes the order of bits on the opposite Generated from method MR.TypedBitSet<MR.Id<MR.ICPElemtTag>>::reverse.
adds one more bit with the given value in the container, increasing its size on 1 Generated from method MR.TypedBitSet<MR.Id<MR.ICPElemtTag>>::push_back.
removes last bit from the container, decreasing its size on 1 Generated from method MR.TypedBitSet<MR.Id<MR.ICPElemtTag>>::pop_back.
doubles reserved memory until resize(newSize) can be done without reallocation Generated from method MR.TypedBitSet<MR.Id<MR.ICPElemtTag>>::resizeWithReserve.

Vector<bool, I> like container (random-access, I - index type, bool - value type) with all bits after size() considered off during testing Generated from class MR.TypedBitSet<MR.Id<MR.ICPElemtTag>>. Base classes: Direct: (non-virtual) MR.BitSet This is the non-const half of the class.
